name: Tome of the Tarnished Gods
description: Notes Part of the Agents of Oryx Abilities.
effects: Holy Orb: Healing [65/s] on allies within 7.5 sqrs Inner Effect: Healing [80/s] Darkness Orb: Zaps enemies for 250 damage every 0.6 seconds within 7.5 sqrs Inner Effect: Zaps twice as much Inner Range: 3.75 sqrs Orb Duration: 6 seconds
